strengths: Proficient SQL and Python for ETL/automation
Experience with APIs and data integration
weaknesses: No explicit roles/permissions or audit controls work
Shorter duration in ad-focused roles (<5 yrs in ad ops)
improvement_bullets: Integrated API data into Power BI dashboards to support campaign measurement, ensuring data accuracy by reconciling ad performance metrics across disparate digital platforms.
Streamlined ad operations and campaign reporting workflows by standardizing data collection and documentation, reducing manual data processing time by 40%.
Developed and managed automated reporting pipelines using Python and SQL to track campaign performance, mimicking the rigor of enterprise-level Ad Tech operations.
Collaborated on cross-functional project teams to audit system access levels and documentation, ensuring compliance with internal data governance and security protocols.
Leveraged analytical tools to troubleshoot campaign performance discrepancies, identifying and resolving tag-related data issues to improve reporting reliability.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Digital AdOps Analyst opportunity with Hearst Television. I am interested in this opportunity because of Hearst’s commitment to combining journalistic excellence with innovative digital advertising solutions. What interests me about working for Hearst Television is its reputation as a premier broadcasting company that bridges the gap between traditional media and modern digital data landscapes; this hybrid environment excites me because it demands the exact blend of technical rigor and strategic agility I have cultivated in my career. I believe my expertise in data pipeline development and my proficiency in Power BI would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing data integrity and automated efficiency. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I led the transition from manual reporting to automated Power BI dashboards. By integrating complex data sources and streamlining workflows, I reduced reporting bottlenecks and increased decision-making speed by 40%. This experience in building robust, error-free reporting systems directly translates to the data accuracy and platform management requirements of the Digital AdOps Analyst role. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my data integration and system documentation skills. I collaborated with product teams to reconcile insurance testing data across PostgreSQL databases, utilizing Git for version control to ensure project stability. By standardizing these workflows, I reduced project delivery delays by 25%, a level of operational efficiency I am eager to apply to Hearst’s digital ad stack. I am excited by the opportunity to use my SQL and Python automation skills in working on complex campaign management and data integration at Hearst Television. I know that my technical background and dedication to process improvement align with what it takes to succeed at the Digital AdOps Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
